codeReview.summary: All 8 feature requirements were addressed correctly. C2 (remove --skip-generate) and C3 (pnpm cache + frozen-lockfile) are clean CI fixes. I8 (production API in Playwright) correctly changed from pnpm dev to pnpm build && node dist/main.js, though a follow-up commit (471d723) was needed to use tsx instead of node due to Prisma 7 ESM compat. I9 (mkdirSync for auth dir) is correctly placed before storageState. I2 and VAL-SVC-PATHS were already portable from previous workers — worker correctly verified and skipped. Category alignment added Fragrances and Eyewear to all 4 locations (API create.ts, update.ts, dashboard new and edit pages) matching shared/categories.ts. CSRF PUT added to dashboard api.ts. Build, typecheck, and all 123 API tests pass.

issues.description: I8: Worker used 'node dist/main.js' for production start, which is correct per apps/api/package.json 'start' script. However, Prisma 7 with driver adapters requires tsx for ESM compatibility — plain 'node' fails at runtime. This was caught and fixed in follow-up commit 471d723 (cross-area-e2e-validation feature) which changed to 'npx tsx dist/main.js'. The worker could have tested the Playwright webServer launch end-to-end to catch this, but it's a reasonable edge case.

Category alignment: Zod error message is now a long string listing all 8 categories inline. Minor readability concern — could reference PRODUCT_CATEGORIES dynamically instead of hardcoding the list in the message string. Same issue in update.ts line 20. Not blocking since it's functionally correct.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md category list is inaccurate. It lists 10 categories: Watches, Jewelry, Handbags, Leather Goods, Clothing, Footwear, Accessories, Fragrances, Eyewear, Other. But the actual code has 8: Leather Goods, Jewelry, Watches, Fashion, Accessories, Fragrances, Eyewear, Other. 'Handbags', 'Clothing', 'Footwear' don't exist in the codebase; 'Fashion' is in the code but missing from AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep for 'Handbags|Clothing|Footwear' across all .ts/.tsx/.yaml files returns 0 matches. packages/shared/src/constants/categories.ts and apps/api/src/routes/products/create.ts both use 'Fashion' not 'Clothing'. AGENTS.md line under Dashboard conventions: 'Category enum values MUST match API: "Watches", "Jewelry", "Handbags", "Leather Goods", "Clothing", "Footwear", "Accessories", "Fragrances", "Eyewear", "Other"'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Prisma 7 with pg driver adapter and ESM modules requires tsx to run compiled output — plain 'node dist/main.js' fails. The API's package.json 'start' script says 'node dist/main.js' but this doesn't work for Playwright webServer (or any context needing Prisma at runtime). This was discovered via the follow-up fix commit 471d723. Should be documented as a known quirk.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Commit 471d723 message: 'fix(e2e): use tsx to run API in Playwright webServer for Prisma 7 ESM compat'. Changed from 'node dist/main.js' to 'npx tsx dist/main.js'. apps/api/package.json still has 'start': 'node dist/main.js' which may also need updating.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker's skillFeedback notes that infra-worker skill mandates TDD (write tests first), but config/CI changes (ci.yml edits, init.sh portability, constant alignment) don't fit the red-green-refactor pattern. The skill could explicitly exempt config-only changes from TDD.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'The infra-worker skill mentions writing tests first (TDD), but for config/CI changes like ci.yml edits, init.sh portability, and constant alignment, TDD doesn\'t apply.' Worker set followedProcedure=true despite this deviation, which is reasonable.

sharedStateObservations.observation: apps/api/package.json 'start' script uses 'node dist/main.js' but this doesn't work with Prisma 7 ESM. The script may need to be updated to 'npx tsx dist/main.js' to match how the API is actually run in production-like contexts (Playwright webServer).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: apps/api/package.json line: '"start": "node dist/main.js"'. But playwright.config.ts (after 471d723 fix) uses 'npx tsx dist/main.js'. Inconsistency between package.json start script and actual working command.

summary: Feature passes review. All 8 requirements from the feature description were correctly addressed: C2 (Prisma 7 --skip-generate removal), C3 (pnpm cache + frozen-lockfile), I8 (production API in Playwright), I9 (auth dir mkdirSync), I2/VAL-SVC-PATHS (verified already portable), category alignment (Fragrances + Eyewear added to API and dashboard), and CSRF PUT in dashboard api.ts. The only issue requiring a follow-up fix was the I8 node vs tsx Prisma 7 ESM compatibility, which was caught and resolved by the subsequent cross-area-e2e-validation feature (commit 471d723). Build, typecheck, and all tests pass.
